{"cards": [{"name": "Blazing Confluence", "mana_cost": "{2}{R}{R}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["R"], "color_identity": ["R"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Choose two —
• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Create two 1/1 red Elemental creature tokens with haste.", "flavor_text": ""Fire speaks in many tongues, but all mean destruction." —Kara, flame-speaker", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A modal instant that showcases red's versatility. The three modes cover red's core abilities: direct damage, artifact destruction, and aggressive creature creation. 'Choose two' makes it powerful and flexible enough for rare. The mana cost is fair for the power level - you get two effects but pay premium mana. Tests modal formatting with the bullet point structure."}, {"name": "Chronicle of the Wild Hunt", "mana_cost": "{3}{G}", "cmc": 4, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal them, put them into your hand, then shuffle.
II — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
III — You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you do, it gains trample until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "A green saga that tells the story of a growing hunt. Chapter I provides ramp and card selection (very green). Chapter II buffs your board state with +1/+1 counters. Chapter III provides a big payoff by cheating a creature into play with trample. The three chapters escalate in power level, and the overall effect justifies rare status. Tests proper Saga formatting with Roman numerals."}, {"name": "Crystalline Cavern", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "~ enters tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2.", "flavor_text": "The crystals within whisper secrets of what's yet to come.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "A colorless utility land that provides card selection. Enters tapped to balance the scry ability. The {3} activation cost makes it a meaningful investment while being accessible in any deck. Scry 2 is a reasonable effect for the cost and rarity level. Tests land templating with tap symbol and activated ability formatting."}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots run deeper than memory, connecting all life in an endless web of growth.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "A basic Forest with evocative flavor text that captures the interconnectedness of nature. The flavor emphasizes green's themes of growth, connection, and the ancient natural world. Tests basic land templating with the standard mana ability and demonstrates how flavor text can enhance even the simplest cards."}]}
